stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding RNAV/RNP navigation specifications and any requirements for on-board performance monitoring and alerting?

options.a: RNAV specifications include the requirement for on-board performance monitoring and alerting.
options.b: RNAV specifications include the requirement for on-board and ground-based performance monitoring and alerting.
options.c: RNP specifications include the requirement for on-board performance monitoring and alerting.
options.d: RNP specifications include the requirement for ATC surveillance to alert the flight crew if systems performance does not comply.
